title: Endo H/ PNGase F Assay for JESS Automated Western Blot
author: Charis Ma

steps.title: In an eppendorf tube, add 40...
steps.instruction: In an eppendorf tube, add 40 µg protein, 2 µL 10X Glycoprotein Denaturing Buffer, and water for a total reaction volume of 20 µL . Mix well.

steps.title: Denature glycoprotein by heating reaction at 100 °C for 00:10:00
steps.instruction: Denature glycoprotein by heating reaction at 100 °C for 00:10:00 .

steps.title: Split reaction volume into 2 eppendorf...
steps.instruction: Split reaction volume into 2 eppendorf tubes with 10 uL in each tube. One tube will be used for the EndoH reaction, while the other will be used for the PNGaseF reaction.

steps.title: Add the following to one reaction tube from step 3
steps.instruction: Add the following to one reaction tube from step 3: 2 µL 10X GlycoBuffer 3, 2 µL Endo H, 6 µL water. Total volume will be 20 µL .

steps.title: Add the following to the second...
steps.instruction: Add the following to the second reaction tube from step 3: 2 µL 10X GlycoBuffer 2, 2 µL NP-40, 6 µL water, 1 µL PNGaseF. Total volume will be 21 µL .

steps.title: Add 480 µL and 479 µL of 0
steps.instruction: Add 480 µL and 479 µL of 0.1X Sample Buffer (Bio-Techne) to the Endo H and PNGaseF reaction tubes respectively to make the final volume 500 µL .

steps.title: Add all 500 µL of each...
steps.instruction: Add all 500 µL of each reaction to a 10K Amicon Ultra Centrifugal Filter

steps.title: Spin at 14000 x g, °C, for 00:20:00
steps.instruction: Spin at 14000 x g, °C, for 00:20:00 . You will recover a final volume of 20 µL , and the protein concentration recovered will be ~ 1 mg/mL .

steps.title: Add 4 parts of the washed...
steps.instruction: Add 4 parts of the washed Endo H/ PNGaseF sample from step 12 with 1 part of 5X Fluorescent Master Mix (Bio-Techne).

steps.title: Load into JESS microplate (Bio-techne) to...
steps.instruction: Load into JESS microplate (Bio-techne) to be detected by the Automated Western Blot System.
